'''''Deephopper''''' was the name of [[Marka Durn]]'s battered [[Ghtroc Industries/Legends|Ghtroc Industries]] [[Freighter/Legends|freighter]]. He was always upgrading it with his [[Droid/Legends|droid]], [[R2-C9]].

==Appearances==
*{{WEGCite|story=The Treasure of Celis Mott|book=Instant Adventures}}
